newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The latest substantive update was the Q1 2026 earnings (reported in May): record revenue +20% YoY, licensing +58.6% YoY driven by 3nm AI-server-CPU licensing, with a strategic push toward system-level hardware security. Nothing new in the June 9-23 window.

sources.label: Design-Reuse - eMemory Q1 2026 earnings call highlights

verdicts.rankRationale: CPO lens: embedded-memory IP has weak direct CPO/HBM/advanced-packaging/test relevance vs cleaner bottleneck names, and prior case flagged removal. No new evidence since Jun 9 (Q1 print was May); +85% YTD worsens asymmetry. Drift down, -1.
verdicts.bull: 3nm AI-CPU licensing + PUF security ramp; high-margin royalty model.
verdicts.neutral: Useful ecosystem node but tangential to the optics choke point.
verdicts.bear: Single-bundle validation risk; weak direct CPO relevance; +85% YTD.
